dj_text: The X-Files (Medieval Cover) was beautiful. And I Just Called to Say I Love You (Medieval Cover) keeps the vibe alive.
commercial_text: Hungry? Try Big Ron's Midnight Waffle Emporium — half waffles, half emporium, all heart attack.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: I swear someone left the interdimensional frequency door open.
title: I Just Called to Say I Love You (Medieval Cover)
